constraints: You are given a tree with NNN nodes. Each node iii has an associated value AiA_iAi​.
You can choose some subset SSS of the NNN nodes. You are given MMM requirements that SSS should satisfy, each of the form:
(u,r,k)(u, r, k)(u,r,k): When the tree is at rooted rrr, the number of nodes in the subtree of uuu, which are also a part of SSS is **exactly** kkk.
Find the minimum possible sum of values of the nodes in the subset SSS while also satisfying all requirements, i.e. minimize ∑x∈SAx\sum\limits_{x \in S} A_xx∈S∑​Ax​.
**Additional guarantee on input:** At least one valid subset SSS exists.
Input Format
The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.
The first line contains NNN and MMM - the number of nodes in the tree and the number of requirements.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
Each of the next N−1N - 1N−1 lines contains 222 space-separated integers uuu and vvv, indicating an edge between uuu and vvv.
Each of the next MMM lines contains 333 space-separated integers u,r,u, r, u,r, and kkk - the parameters of a requirement.
Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum possible sum of values of nodes in SSS.
1≤u,v≤N,u≠v1 \le u, v \le N, u \ne v1≤u,v≤N,u=v
The edges (u,v)(u, v)(u,v) form a tree
1≤u,r,k≤N1 \le u, r, k \le N1≤u,r,k≤N
There exists a valid SSS for each test.
The sum of NNN and the sum of MMM both do not exceed 200020002000.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The constraint basically means that we must choose exactly 111 node from the entire tree. Choosing the minimum node is obviously optimal, hence our subset S={1}S = \{1\}S={1} and the value is −10-10−10.
Test case 222: We have to choose exactly 222 nodes from the subtree of 333 when rooted at 555. This means exactly 222 nodes from the set {1,2,3,6}\{1, 2, 3, 6\}{1,2,3,6}.
We choose the ones with minimum value, i.e. nodes 111 and 333. We also include node 555 in the set SSS as there is no constraint on not choosing it, and it has negative AiA_iAi​ value.
Hence our set S={1,3,5}S = \{1, 3, 5\}S={1,3,5}, and the sum of values is −7-7−7.
